hero_sub_line_1: Ximia AI replaces forms, chatbots, and websites that don't convert.

messages.text: Hi, I'm looking to invest my savings.
Perfect. Are you looking for immediate monthly rental income or long-term appreciation (pre-construction)?
USD rent, as soon as possible.
Got it. I'll filter for finished projects in high-demand areas (e.g. AIRBNB). Shall we proceed with that profile?
I love unit 4B, but I only have $120k in cash.
The price is $150k. With your $120k (80%), you instantly qualify for our 24-month developer financing. The installment would be $1,250/mo.
Validated ✔️. Preparing the formal simulation and connecting you with the sales team to reserve.
Family of 4. We want a house with a backyard.
Logged: Family use, 4 people, outdoor space. North zone or Pilar corridor?
I have 3 properties that are an exact match (all 3 beds + garden). Would you like to schedule visits for the highest-ranked one?

problem_intro_line1: Generating leads isn't the problem anymore.
problem_intro_line2: It's knowing what to do with them at the exact right moment.
problem_headline: And they already closed with someone else.
problem_stat_caption: of your leads are just noise
problem_items: Your team wastes hours on manual qualification
Hot leads go cold waiting for a response
The process is bottlenecked by human limits
problem_quote_closing: You need an intelligence that decides, not one that repeats a script.

process_steps.label: 01 · Capture
process_steps.title: Understand exactly what they want
process_steps.description: Detect if they want a home, investment, or land right from the conversation.

process_steps.label: 02 · Analyze
process_steps.title: Evaluate financial viability
process_steps.description: Validate their budget and profile using real market logic.

process_steps.label: 04 · Close
process_steps.title: Deliver a ready-to-close lead
process_steps.description: All the information is structured to accelerate the closing process.
